name: repo-x-ray
description: Understand any codebase in plain language.

interface.shortDescription: Turn unfamiliar code into a clear explanation.
interface.longDescription: Explain what a repository, file, function, or code snippet does, how it runs, which parts matter, and where to start reading—all in plain language.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Repo X-Ray to explain what this code does, how it runs, and where I should start reading.
